subject: Re: Warp/M TensorFlow update
body:
Hi Cyan,

I think lots of people are facing the same issues, not all features which use TF work with the newer GPU models.

All 20- series cards work in our hands

Cheers,

Alister



> On 31 Jan 2022, at 08:42, Cyan Ching <xingyichengcyanching@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Dear Warp/M users,
> 
> Anyone happened to have benchmarked Warp/M performance on different GPUs? 
> 
> Any recommendations on GPUs that have robust Warp/M performance based on your experience?
> 
> Best,
> 
> Cyan Ching
> 
> PhD student
> 
> The Physical Chemistry Curie Lab
> 
> On Fri, 28 Jan 2022 at 13:29, Cyan Ching <xingyichengcyanching@gmail.com <mailto:xingyichengcyanching@gmail.com>> wrote:
> Dear Warp/M users,
> 
> Good morning/day/evening!
> 
> Does anyone know if there will be a TensorFlow update of Warp and M any time soon? My lab is looking at purchasing new machines with RTX 3090 GPUs, but if the TensorFlow issue persists, we'd consider other options. Besides P6000, do you have more recommendations (preferably newer models) that have robust performance for running both Warp and M?
> 
> Thank you for your help in advance!
> 
> Best,
> 
> Cyan Ching
> 
> PhD student
> 
> The Physical Chemistry Curie Lab
> 
> 
> 
> --
